productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max 1 White Casual Shoe
description: Belived to be nike's hardest working running shoe, the nike Air Max 1 comes with that perfect blend of cushioning and stability, becoming a popular trainer at the Olympiads. With its low profile stylish upper, visible cushioning unit and grippy outsole, this shoe makes for a great buy for the serious runner. Upper Fabric upper with suede overlays and fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned tongue and collar for snug comfort Padded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole with a visible Nike Air unit in the heel for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for maximum cushioning and optimal traction on various surfaces Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
